title: ctenitopsis dissecta
intro: Ctenitopsis dissecta is a plant species, also known as the 'Dissected Ctenitopsis', which belongs to the family of plants that are part of the Lamiaceae order. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. The herbal preparations of Ctenitopsis dissecta often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
